mapper.select: SELECT id, tcm_herb_id, herb_name_zh, pinyin_name, latin_name, english_name, type, efficacy_zh, function_en, efficacy_category, toxicity_zh, toxic_en, toxic_description_zh, toxic_effect_en, pharmacopoeia_record, classification, classification_zh, use_part, nature_taste_zh, property_en, meridian_zh, meridian_tropism_en, indications_zh, indication_en FROM core_tcm_herbs WHERE tcm_herb_id = #{tcmHerbId}

SELECT id, tcm_herb_id, herb_name_zh, pinyin_name, latin_name, english_name, type, efficacy_zh, function_en, efficacy_category, toxicity_zh, toxic_en, toxic_description_zh, toxic_effect_en, pharmacopoeia_record, classification, classification_zh, use_part, nature_taste_zh, property_en, meridian_zh, meridian_tropism_en, indications_zh, indication_en FROM core_tcm_herbs WHERE MATCH(efficacy_zh, indications_zh) AGAINST(#{keyword} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) OR herb_name_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pinyin_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR classification LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR classification_zh LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT tp.id, tp.tcm_prescription_id, tp.name_zh, tp.pinyin_name, tp.source, tp.indications_zh, tp.indications_en, tp.effects, tp.effects_zh FROM tcm_prescriptions tp WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM prescription_core_herb_rel pchr WHERE pchr.tcm_prescription_id = tp.tcm_prescription_id AND pchr.tcm_herb_id = #{herbId} ) ORDER BY tp.id ASC

SELECT ht.gene_name AS geneName, ht.log2_fc_avg AS log2FcAvg, ht.p_value AS pValue, ht.direction, ht.source, CASE WHEN ABS(ht.log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND ht.p_value < 0.05 THEN 'significant' ELSE 'not_significant' END AS significance, CASE WHEN ht.p_value < 0.001 THEN '***' WHEN ht.p_value < 0.01 THEN '**' WHEN ht.p_value < 0.05 THEN '*' ELSE 'ns' END AS significanceLabel FROM herb_transcriptomics ht WHERE ht.tcm_herb_id = #{tcmHerbId} ORDER BY ABS(ht.log2_fc_avg) DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS totalGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'up' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS upregulatedGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'down' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS downregulatedGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN ABS(log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND p_value < 0.05 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS significantGenes, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'up' AND ABS(log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND p_value < 0.05 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS significantUpregulated, SUM(CASE WHEN direction = 'down' AND ABS(log2_fc_avg) >= 1 AND p_value < 0.05 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS significantDownregulated, MAX(ABS(log2_fc_avg)) AS maxAbsLog2Fc, MIN(p_value) AS minPValue FROM herb_transcriptomics WHERE tcm_herb_id = #{tcmHerbId}
